column7:
• You only need to input values into the blue cells in B2 - B10.
• Start in Mode (B2): double-click to choose a mode. Most of the time, 'Plan by run time' will be what you want.
• Default maltodextrin to fructose ratio is 1:0.8. You can change the ratio as desired in B5 & 6.
• Plan by Run Time: enter run duration in h:mm then enter your target rate of carb consumption in g/h. Final Carbs equals total carbs for the run.
• Adjust sodium target as desired (mg/h). Default value is a good starting point. I advise leaving potassium at 200mg/h but feel free to adjust as desired.
• Grey + italic cells are inactive for selected mode.
• Quantity (C20 - C26): these are the final quantities of each ingredient required based on the inputs you entered.
• Look at the Final Volume value (E4) and make sure your packaging choices are sufficient.
• Use the blue Reset Inputs button to reset to default values.
• You can only set sodium and potassium targets in Plan by Run Time Mode.
Loving this calculator? Please subscribe to my channel for even more goodness!
